dashboard_meta.architecture: Layer 1 agents are sealed independent raw signal producers. No cross-agent communication.

agents.summary: USD Layer 1 raw call generated from sealed independent workflow.

24h.reason: USD bearish lean driven by narrowing US-DE 2Y spread, falling US 10Y real yields, and declining DXY. Bullish US 2Y yield rise is outweighed by these bearish signals. Missing US economic surprise and Fed bias data lowers conviction. Primary drivers show conflict, further reducing conviction.
